rationale.sub-016: Broader verbalwm evaluation shows concentrated failure plus quality attrition, with 235 of 256 eval windows passing quality gates and aggregate standardized delta far worse than null.
rationale.sub-017: Broader verbalwm evaluation shows meaningful quality attrition with 212 of 256 eval windows passing quality gates and consistent underperformance, but the failure is not severe enough for automatic exclusion.
rationale.sub-011: The cohort-plus-sub011 calibrated expansion keeps all 256 windows quality-pass, but the full calibrated morphology aggregate no longer beats null and the failure is concentrated in dominant-beat timing targets. Keep sub-011 pending review for the default full-morphology calibrated cohort.

notes: This policy currently covers the reviewed 8-subject DS006848 verbalwm development cohort plus the pending-review remainder of the 30-subject verbalwm pool.
Use default_train_eval as the default pool for current DS006848 verbalwm baselines and slice analyses.
Treat borderline_review subjects as eligible, but always surface their per-subject metrics separately.
Keep stress_test_only subjects out of default training and evaluation unless the experiment is explicitly about robustness or artifact correction.
Pending-review subjects are not excluded; they simply have not yet been promoted into the reviewed default cohort.
Sub-011 now has an explicit negative note for the default full-morphology calibrated path, but it may still be usable in narrower amplitude-family experiments.
